name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
description: AI agents v14.0.0 — Plan-first readiness, parallel execution via git worktrees, continuous autonomous mode with stacked PRs, dual-agent QA, opt-in telemetry, gate-event webhooks. The /autonomous orchestration shell graduates to a default multi-iteration loop (cap 10, default 3) with stacked-branch semantics — iteration N+1 branches from iterations[N].branch, producing a reviewable bottom-up PR stack. Restore v13 cadence with --no-stacked-branches; reproduce v13's single-iter default with --max-iterations 1. New flags: --notify enables opt-in gate-event webhooks (rubric, adjudication, NO-GO, Plan Review FAIL × 3) gated on AI_AGENT_MANAGER_WEBHOOK_URL with jq-only injection-safe payload construction; --non-interactive-fallback enables a per-gate fail-closed policy for CI / stdin-not-tty environments. Supervisor gains --base-branch + --non-interactive flags plus Phase 0/4/4.5 base-mismatch detection + cleanup, and emits optional additive branch_base + pr_state fields on SUPERVISOR_RESULT (schema_version still 1, optional). Context-Keeper gains atomic set_flag / get_flag / clear_flag operations under a new ## Phase Flags section in state.md. AUTONOMOUS_RUN bumps to schema_version 2 with nine new closed status_reason values covering the stacked-branch / non-interactive-fallback / gh-retry / no-rubric / deprecated-flag-conflict paths — see docs/RESULT_SCHEMAS.md AUTONOMOUS_RUN section for the authoritative list. W-NEW-3 spike PASSED pre-merge: Code Reviewer + Rubric Grader both honor DIFF-SCOPE OVERRIDE inline directives on stacked-branch fixtures. v14 is additive on top of v13: no new agent, no hook count change in v14.0.0 (still 14). v14.1.0 adds the notification surface — `PreToolUse[AskUserQuestion]` + `Notification` hooks driving `notify-desktop.sh` (OS banner) and a `send-webhook.sh` paused-event path, with a `.supervisor/notify-config.json` fallback and ntfy-aware payload — bringing the hook count 14 → 17 (2 new events / 3 new entries). v14.2.0 adds the concurrency/resume layer — the `LAUNCH_PAD_RESULT` schema (validated by `scripts/validate-launch-pad-result.py`) makes `saved_brief_path` the primary `/autonomous` brief-detection signal, retiring the fragile `ls`-diff footgun; plus `session-resume.sh` SessionStart rehydration on resume/clear/compact — adding 2 hooks (count 17 → 19). v14.2.1 is a correctness patch: `send-webhook.sh` (supervisor_result path) and `send-telemetry-core.sh` now read the finishing subagent's output from the real SubagentStop fields (`last_assistant_message`, then legacy inline names, then the `agent_transcript_path` / `transcript_path` JSONL) instead of the non-existent top-level `result_block`, which had silently suppressed every supervisor-completion webhook and telemetry post since v14.1.0 — no hook-count / schema / agent change. All v13.0.0 / v13.0.1 capabilities preserved (foreground-assisted gates bubble AskUserQuestion in-session, rubric-gate user-merge verification, Option C inter_subtask_gap re-plan, webhook empty-payload suppression). Preserves all v12.2.0 capabilities (Agent Teams graduation, Outcomes Rubric, /dreaming, opt-in SubagentStop webhook hook), v12.1.0 documentation increments (Memory Tool, Structured Outputs, SDK-only Advisor note), v12.0.0 reliability primitives (provides/requires contracts, pre-spawn verification, 4-option adjudication, effort-tier discipline, WORKER_RESULT schema_version 2), and prior v11/v10 layers. 13 agent roles, 50 reusable skills, 19 quality gate hooks, 12 slash commands, persistent agent memory, bundled MySQL MCP server.
